title: USGS National Wildlife Health Center
description: A USGS source card about wildlife disease, ecology, and public science response.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: The USGS National Wildlife Health Center studies wildlife disease, ecosystem health, emerging threats, and how scientists investigate animal mortality events.
Use this source for inquiry reading about ecology, evidence collection, public health connections, and how scientists respond to environmental problems.
USGS text is generally public domain, while linked images, maps, and partner resources may have item-level credits or restrictions.
